name: Zucchini Pizzas
recipeInstructions: Preheat broiler, placing the rack about 5 inches from the heat source. Cut zucchini into slices that are 1/4 inch thick. Lightly salt the slices. Place them on a baking sheet and add in order: pizza sauce, olives, green onions, and cheese. Broil until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 4-5 minutes. The zucchini should be tender-crisp. Yield will depend on the size of the zucchini.
